creator: olivier@freebsd.org
text:
Hi, right now the port version is 4.29.
So did I correctly understand your request: You would like adding back a port named  like sysutils/mstflint-legacy re-introducing the version 4.25 (from 2023-10-04) ?
I could try to add back this version and testing if it compile, but I don’t have ConnectX-3 card to test it.
